payload.answer: I found one saved article about AI memory. The recall input identifies it only as an AI memory article; it does not provide a title, author, or URL. I did not count the Brain/Cognee chat as a saved article.

entity_resolution.reason: No stable article title, URL, or record identifier was provided to resolve a specific article entity.

payload.intent: recall saved articles about AI memory

memory_cards.statement: You have saved one article about AI memory, but the provided recall input does not include its title or URL.

details: Filtered for records relevant to saved articles about AI memory.
Ignored unrelated family facts, Sam preferences, the knowledge-graph open loop, the Brain/Cognee chat, and non-article table content unless explicitly identified as saved AI-memory articles.

repair_options: Provide the full saved-articles table or source records so I can return exact titles and links.
